title: An Act appropriating funds for the adoption of various portions of the Virgin Islands Agricultural Plan for fiscal year ending September 30, 2025
text:
ACTNO.891 8
BILL NO. 35-0378
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act appropriating funds for the adoption of various portions of the Virgin Islands
Agricultural Plan for fiscal year ending September 30, 2025
---0---
Be itenactedby the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The sum of$250,000 is appropriated from General Fund ofthe Treasury
ofthe Government of the Virgin Islands in the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, to the
Agriculture Business Center within the Small Business Development Center for operating
expenses.
SECTION 2. The sum of $250,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025,
to the University of the Virgin Islands Office of Sponsored Programs for obtaining major
federal grants to address water, irrigation, or infrastructure and other agriculture needs for the
Virgin Islands.
SECTION 3. The sum of$383,000 is appropriated from the General Fund oftheTreasury
ofthe Government of the Virgin Islands in the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, to the
University ofthe Virgin Islands’ Office ofSponsored Program.
SECTION 4. The sum of$150,000 is appropriated from the General Fund oftheTreasury
ofthe Government of the Virgin Islands in the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, to the
University ofthe Virgin Islands for the Eastern Caribbean Center for data collection.
SECTION 5. The sum of $500,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025,
to the Virgin Islands Economic Development Authority tqestablish a Public-Private Investment
Fund and a Farmer’s Grant Matching Fund in coordination with the Local Food and Farm
Advisory Committee.
SECTION 6. The sum of $274,500 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025,
to the University ofthe Virgin Islands for the operations ofthe Local Food and Farn Advisory
Committee to include the operations of the Local Food and Farm Advisory Committee
Operations, the Food Symbol Development and Marketing, Data Collection and Analysis, and
to create a short-term and long-term plan to address critical water and infrastructure needs, and
develop organic agriculture in conjunction with the Virgin Islands Department ofAgriculture.

2
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this3CFday of
September, A.D., 2024.
aAA A
Novecle iE.s,Jr.
President
Secretary
Bill No. 35-0378 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This (t’— day ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
